title: nehpt Experience
description: This mod was created with the ideas of the youtuber nehpt.
body: This mod adds 3 new entities. The Average Height nehpt, the SpiderNehpt, and the Nut. Using things you obtain from the Average Height nehpt, and SpiderNehpt and the Nut, you can craft a new set of armor. This set of armor is even stronger than netherite. You also will have the ability to milk the nut as you would a cow. This milk works the same as powdered snow.
